## Checklist before requesting a review
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] If it is a core feature, I have added thorough tests
- [ ] I have run `pylint`, `black`, `flake8`, and `mypy` locally
- [ ] All functions include Google Style docstrings with `Args`, `Returns`, and `Raises`
- [ ] I have not degraded performance metrics beyond O(n^1/4) baseline
